nasb.text: You renew Your witnesses against me And increase Your anger toward me; Hardship after hardship is with me.

esv.text: You renew your witnesses against me and increase your vexation toward me; you bring fresh troops against me.

cnv.text: 你重新設立見證攻擊我， 對我加增你的忿怒， 派兵輪流攻擊我。

ccb.text: 你一再派证人指控我， 你对我越来越愤怒， 使军队轮流攻击我。
